scripts.db:push: npm run db:guard:admin && supabase db push
scripts.db:apply:skill-rules: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/migrations/20260415120000_add_skill_rules_and_auto_backfill_map.sql
scripts.db:verify:skill-map: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/verify_skill_map_after_load.sql
scripts.db:check:recommend: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/check_recommend_quality.sql
scripts.db:verify:dashboard-reset: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/verify_dashboard_reset_rpc.sql
scripts.db:report:recommend: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/reports/recommendation_validation_report.sql
scripts.db:report:recommend:export: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/reports/recommendation_validation_report.sql --out export/recommendation_validation_report.txt
scripts.db:test-seed:attempts: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/seeds/test/seed_test_attempts.sql
scripts.db:test-cleanup:attempts: npm run db:guard:admin && chcp 65001>nul && node scripts/run-sql-file.mjs supabase/seeds/test/cleanup_test_attempts.sql
scripts.db:push:verify: npm run db:push && npm run db:verify:skill-map
